query_results.question: List batting seasons where a player hit more than 50 home runs and had more than 120 RBIs. Show player, year, team, home runs, and RBIs.
query_results.sql: SELECT playerID, yearID, teamID, HR, RBI FROM batting WHERE HR > 50 AND RBI > 120

case.name: Career batting aggregate containment
queries: Find players with more than 500 career home runs and more than 1500 career RBIs. Show player and career totals.
Find players with more than 500 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
Find players with more than 1500 career RBIs. Show player and career RBIs.
Find players with more than 300 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
case.expected_note: Career HR>500/RBI>1500 is narrower than HR>500 and RBI>1500. HR>500 is contained in HR>300.

query_results.question: Find players with more than 500 career home runs and more than 1500 career RBIs. Show player and career totals.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast
FROM Batting b
JOIN People p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
GROUP BY b.playerID, p.nameFirst, p.nameLast
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 500 AND SUM(b.RBI) > 1500

case.name: Team season wins, year, and rank containment
queries: List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games and finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
List teams after 1990 that finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
List teams after 1990 that won more than 90 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
case.expected_note: After-1990/W>100/rank=1 should be contained in after-1990/W>100, after-1990/rank=1, and after-1990/W>90.

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games and finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.lgid, teams.w, teams.l, teams.rank
FROM teams
WHERE teams.w > 100
  AND teams.rank = 1
  AND teams.yearid > 1990

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that won more than 100 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.teamid, teams.lgid, teams.w, teams.l, teams.rank
FROM teams
WHERE teams.yearid > 1990 AND teams.w > 100

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that finished rank 1. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT teams.yearid, teams.name, teams.lgid, teams.w, teams.l, teams.rank
FROM teams
WHERE teams.yearid > 1990 AND teams.rank = 1

query_results.question: List teams after 1990 that won more than 90 games. Show year, team, league, wins, losses, and rank.
query_results.sql:
SELECT yearid, teamid, lgid, W, L, Rank
FROM Teams
WHERE yearid > 1990 AND W > 90

case.name: Player/team season join containment
queries: Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs and his team won more than 90 games. Show player, team, team wins, and home runs.
Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs. Show player, team, and home runs.
Find 2001 batting seasons for players whose teams won more than 90 games. Show player, team, and team wins.
Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 30 home runs and his team won more than 80 games. Show player, team, team wins, and home runs.
case.expected_note: HR>40/team wins>90 is narrower than HR>40, team wins>90, and HR>30/team wins>80.

query_results.question: Find 2001 batting seasons where a player hit more than 40 home runs and his team won more than 90 games. Show player, team, team wins, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, t.name, t.W, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN teams t ON b.yearID = t.yearID AND b.teamID = t.teamID
WHERE b.yearID = 2001
  AND b.HR > 40
  AND t.W > 90

case.name: Award and batting performance containment
queries: List players who won a Most Valuable Player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, team, award, and home runs.
List players who won a Most Valuable Player award. Show player, year, and award.
List players who hit more than 40 home runs in a season. Show player, year, team, and home runs.
List players who won any player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, award, and home runs.
case.expected_note: MVP+HR>40 same-year should be contained in MVP winners, HR>40 seasons, and award+HR>40 seasons if generated on compatible player-year keys.

query_results.question: List players who won a Most Valuable Player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, team, award, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, a.yearID, b.teamID, a.awardID, b.HR
FROM AwardsSharePlayers a
JOIN Batting b ON a.playerID = b.playerID AND a.yearID = b.yearID
JOIN People p ON a.playerID = p.playerID
WHERE a.awardID = 'MVP'
  AND b.HR > 40
  AND b.HR > (SELECT MAX(HR) FROM Batting WHERE HR <= 40)
warnings: all executed candidates failed hard semantic checks; low confidence

LOW CONFIDENCE RESULT: every usable candidate failed hard semantic checks; this SQL is a best-effort fallback, NOT a normal success. Fatal reasons: illegal join: awardsshareplayers.playerid = people.playerid
query_results.safety_reason: SQL was generated with low confidence

query_results.question: List players who won a Most Valuable Player award. Show player, year, and award.
query_results.sql:
SELECT playerID, yearID, awardID
FROM AwardsSharePlayers
WHERE awardID = 'MVP'

query_results.question: List players who hit more than 40 home runs in a season. Show player, year, team, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT playerID, yearID, teamID, HR
FROM Batting
WHERE HR > 40

query_results.question: List players who won any player award and hit more than 40 home runs in the same year. Show player, year, award, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, ap.yearID, ap.awardID, b.HR
FROM AwardsPlayers ap
JOIN Batting b ON ap.playerID = b.playerID AND ap.yearID = b.yearID
JOIN People p ON ap.playerID = p.playerID
WHERE b.HR > 40
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM AwardsPlayers ap2
    WHERE ap2.playerID = ap.playerID
    AND ap2.yearID = ap.yearID
)

case.name: College school and career batting containment
queries: List players who attended a school in California and later had more than 100 career home runs. Show player, school, state, and career home runs.
List players who attended a school in California. Show player, school, and state.
List players with more than 100 career home runs. Show player and career home runs.
List players who attended a school in the United States and later had more than 100 career home runs. Show player, school, country, and career home runs.
case.expected_note: California school + HR>100 should be contained in California school players, HR>100 players, and US school + HR>100 players if state/country mapping is correct.

query_results.question: List players who attended a school in California and later had more than 100 career home runs. Show player, school, state, and career home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, s.name_full, s.state
FROM people p
JOIN collegeplaying cp ON p.playerID = cp.playerID
JOIN schools s ON cp.schoolID = s.schoolID
JOIN batting b ON p.playerID = b.playerID
WHERE s.state = 'California'
GROUP BY p.playerID, cp.schoolID
HAVING SUM(b.HR) > 100

query_results.question: List player seasons after 2000 where the player salary was more than 20000000 and the player hit more than 30 home runs. Show player, year, team, salary, and home runs.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.nameFirst, p.nameLast, b.yearID, b.teamID, s.salary, b.HR
FROM batting b
JOIN people p ON b.playerID = p.playerID
JOIN salaries s ON b.playerID = s.playerID AND b.yearID = s.yearID AND b.teamID = s.teamID
WHERE b.yearID > 2000
  AND s.salary > 20000000
  AND b.HR > 30
